scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('package-lock.json', {force: true}); fs.rmSync('yarn.lock', {force: true}); if (!process.env.npm_config_user_agent || !process.env.npm_config_user_agent.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
